description: A production-oriented full-stack web application for ArcGIS support log triage. The UX acts as a 'Command Center' merging technical precision with subtle gamification (confidence scores, readiness meters).

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts: Chivo, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono

colors.rules: Tactical Minimalism: Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes (border-white/10). Use high-saturation accent blocks for progress bars and CTA buttons. Tint all greys slightly with blue to match the #0A0A0C obsidian base.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding for structural areas. Cards use p-6. Footers use py-20.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Expose the skeleton. Use grid borders (`border-collapse`, `border-r`, `border-b`) for data-heavy sections instead of floating cards.
spacing_and_layout.radius: Sharp edges or minimal rounding (max `rounded-md` / 6px). No pill-shaped buttons unless it's a specific gamification badge.

navigation.style: Solid Background with a hard bottom border (`border-b border-white/10`). z-50 fixed at top.
navigation.links: Visible on desktop. Use uppercase tracking-wider for nav items.

buttons.primary: Flat solid background (`bg-[#00E5FF] text-black`), sharp corners or max 4px radius, explicit hover state (`hover:bg-[#33EFFF]`).
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px solid border (`border-white/20`), text white, hover:bg-white/5.

cards.default: Flat background (`bg-[#121215]`), 1px subtle border (`border-white/10`), no shadow.
cards.hover_state: Slight lift (`-translate-y-1`), border color darkens or shifts to primary (`border-[#00E5FF]/50`).

forms_and_inputs.style: Shadcn based. Dark backgrounds (`bg-[#0A0A0C]`), 1px border (`border-zinc-800`). Focus state MUST have `focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00E5FF]`.

gamification_ui.progress_bar: Segmented blocks or high-contrast continuous line. Use `#00E5FF` for filling, `#27272A` for track. Glow effect (`drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,229,255,0.5)]`) when 100% complete.
gamification_ui.confidence_score: Small tactical badges. e.g., Green text + green 1px border for >90%, Amber for 50-89%, Red for <50%.
gamification_ui.comparison_cards: Side-by-side bento layout for AI Provider A vs Provider B. Use `border-collapse` style to separate them tightly. Diff highlights: green tinted background for added insights, red for missed.

icons_and_media.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight. Tactical and precise.

images.hero_background: Since image search failed due to rate limits, rely on CSS. Use a radial gradient overlay on `#0A0A0C`: `bg-[radial-gradient(ellipse_at_top,_var(--tw-gradient-stops))] from-zinc-900/40 via-[#0A0A0C] to-[#0A0A0C]`.
images.empty_states: Use abstract Phosphor icons with low opacity (e.g., `text-white/5`) instead of placeholder images.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactive elements. Transition transform 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interactions.loaders: ASCII art style loaders or highly mechanical/terminal style loading bars (`[||||||    ] 60%`).
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Framer motion staggered fade-ins for the dashboard widgets.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against `#121215` meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. Large neon text needs text-shadow if placed on lighter grey backgrounds.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='upload-evidence-button'`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install fonts: Chivo, DM Sans, JetBrains Mono.
Setup Shadcn UI and customize component borders to 1px solid white/10, remove large shadows.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid strategy. Optimize space, minimize padding between widgets, rely on grid borders to separate content.
For the Gamified Logic Tree, use terminal-like or 'quest-log' styling. Use the monospace font for diagnostic questions and bright neon accents for selected paths.
For AI Provider Comparison, render two distinct panels side-by-side using Flexbox or Grid, highlighting differences in reasoning.
Never use `Inter` for headings. Never use generic full-screen gradients.
Ensure all data-testids are implemented as requested.
